name_en: Top-tier Replica [Exclusive Photo M60067 Cement Grey] This Zippy coin purse is made of iconic Monogram canvas, known for its compact and sleek design that fits easily into pockets or small bags. It offers everyday functionality. The LV-engraved zipper ensures security, and the wide opening makes it easy to access coins, cards, and folded bills. 11 x 8.5 x 2 cm (Length x Height x Width)
